controls.lesson: Synthetic Git installation with unrelated history

controls.preventive_control: One implementation-bundle ZIP containing the canonical inner package, detached SHA-256 and PowerShell launcher
controls.regression_test: Verify bundle inventory; launcher's expected hash must match the inner package; inner package must pass the complete release gate

controls.defect: Windows PowerShell 5.1 parser failure caused by non-ASCII UTF-8 source without a byte-order mark
controls.preventive_control: ASCII-only .ps1/.cmd files plus native PowerShell parser precheck in the double-click starter
controls.regression_test: Package preflight and unit test reject non-ASCII executable scripts; starter parses launcher before execution

controls.defect: OneDrive executable path collapsed to a scalar string and [0] returned its first character
controls.preventive_control: Iterate candidate full paths directly; never index an unnormalised pipeline result for an executable path
controls.regression_test: Static package test rejects Start-Process -FilePath $Candidates[0] and requires Resolve-OneDriveExecutable iteration

controls.defect: Launcher source was pasted into an interactive shell and lost script-unit semantics
controls.preventive_control: Normal operator entry is the double-click CMD starter; instructions prohibit interactive source pasting
controls.regression_test: Implementation bundle read-me and starter provide one executable entry point with native parser precheck

controls.defect: Import wrapper performed broad ZIP rediscovery after the launcher had already verified the package
controls.preventive_control: Launcher resolves one adjacent package by SHA-256 and hands the explicit path to the import wrapper
controls.regression_test: Unit test and preflight gate require explicit Package parameter and reject broad download-root discovery
